headline: Google expands personalized Gemini AI to all US users
summary: Google is rolling out its Personal Intelligence feature to all US users, allowing Gemini to draw on data from connected apps like Gmail, Photos, and YouTube to deliver more context-aware responses.

headline: White House releases AI policy blueprint for Congress
summary: The White House published a long-awaited policy wishlist for federal regulation of artificial intelligence, hoping Congress will codify it into law.

headline: Anthropic announces 1M token context window GA for Claude Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6
summary: Anthropic announced general availability of 1 million token context windows for Claude Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6 at standard pricing, with no beta header and media cap up to 600.

headline: AI startups accounted for 41% of venture capital dollars raised in 2025
summary: AI startups accounted for 41% of the $128 billion in venture dollars raised by companies on Carta last year — a record-high annual share. VCs have invested over half a trillion dollars into AI over the last five years.

headline: Jeff Bezos reportedly seeking $100 billion for AI-focused industrial fund
summary: Jeff Bezos is reportedly seeking $100 billion for a new fund to buy up companies in major industrial sectors and transform them with AI technology.

headline: Claude can now create custom charts and inline visualizations
summary: Anthropic rolled out a new feature allowing Claude to create custom charts and inline visualizations directly in responses, available to Max and Pro plans.

headline: Anthropic's Claude business subscriptions grow 4.9% month over month
summary: Anthropic saw business software subscriptions grow 4.9% month over month in February, while OpenAI's subscription share fell 1.5% during the same period.

headline: OpenAI GPT-5.4 mini rollout begins in ChatGPT
summary: OpenAI began rolling out GPT-5.4 mini in ChatGPT, available to Free and Plus users. GPT-5.1 models were deprecated as of March 11, 2026.

headline: Gemini 3.1 Pro positioned as strongest all-around general-purpose AI
summary: As of March 2026, Gemini 3.1 Pro is considered the strongest all-around general-purpose AI model. Free US users now have access to 'Thinking (3 Pro)' for complex reasoning.

headline: NASA's Perseverance rover uses Anthropic's Claude for autonomous Mars navigation
summary: NASA's Perseverance rover completed the first Mars drives ever planned by artificial intelligence, using Anthropic's Claude vision-language models to analyze orbital imagery and terrain data.
